title: [ExportVerilog] Move declarations to the top of blocks when disallowDeclAssignments is set.

features.name: wire declaration with inline assignment inside procedural block
features.description: Code should include a wire or logic variable declared with an inline assignment inside a procedural always or initial block, such that when disallowDeclAssignments is enabled the declaration must be separated from the assignment and hoisted to the top of the block

features.name: multiple variable declarations inside begin-end block requiring hoisting
features.description: Code should include multiple local variable declarations with assignments inside a begin-end block such that declaration ordering is preserved when declarations are moved to the top of the block

features.name: logic declaration with assignment separated from use in nested block
features.description: Code should include a logic variable declared with an initializer inside a nested if or loop body block, where the declaration must be lifted to the enclosing named block top when disallowDeclAssignments is active
